items.html: In the discernment of the externality [Hitzoniut] there are two of the kinds of Ibur [conception] mentioned: the first Ibur is twelve months, and the second Ibur, of the Mochin, was nine months. And in the discernment of the internality [Pnimiut] there were the two kinds of Ibur mentioned: the first Ibur was nine months, and the second Ibur, of the Mochin, was seven months.
